name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle surface. Hosts the rabbit-spec-creator subagent (drafts AND writes a new feature's initial docs/spec.md, returning a {path_written, summary} handoff) with its input assembler scripts/dispatch-spec-creator.py, and the rabbit-spec-update skill (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
